title: ceratochloa pitensis
intro: Ceratochloa pitensis, also known as Chinese Millet or Wild Proso Millet, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Ceratochloa pitensis include lowering blood pressure, reducing cholesterol levels, and alleviating symptoms of asthma and allergies. In herbal preparations, Ceratochloa pitensis is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
